label: Fixed
items: Skipped harvest tasks no longer reappear on Today's quick link as a ghost. The engine was fetching Skipped tombstones bounded by the requested date range — but a harvest-window ghost is generated at its parent blueprint's start date (often months ago), so its tombstone never showed up in the Today-only lookup and the ghost regenerated silently. The tombstone fetch is now blueprint-scoped instead of date-scoped, so a Skipped harvest at any past date correctly suppresses its ghost on every view.
